description_long: This is a classic twin-bell alarm clock with a metallic teal body and two prominent bells on top, each capped with a small silver knob. The clock face is circular, featuring a white background with black Arabic numerals at the 9, 6, and 3 positions, and black clock hands. The clock sits on a glossy, dark red circular base, which provides stability and a contrasting accent to the teal body. The back of the clock is solid and unadorned, while the sides reveal the thickness of the body and the curvature of the bells. The surface is highly reflective, giving the clock a polished, almost mirror-like appearance.
description: A shiny teal twin-bell alarm clock with a white face, black numerals, and a glossy red base. The design is classic and highly reflective, with prominent bells and a sturdy circular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the clock face with black numerals, hands, and the twin bells on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the clock body and the profile of the bells.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid teal back and the reflective surface of the clock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the clock's depth and bell curvature.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with black Arabic numerals at 9, 6, and 3, and black hands; minimalistic and classic.
